name: Valerian
summary: Valerenic acid modulates GABA-A receptors improving sleep latency.
description: Valerenic acid modulates GABA-A receptors improving sleep latency.
safetyNotes: Generally favorable short-term safety in reviewed studies, but sedation, additive CNS depressant effects, product quality, and pregnancy/lactation cautions should be visible.

sources.title: Valerian Root in Treating Sleep Problems and Associated Disorders-A Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis
Insomnia in Elderly Patients: Recommendations for Pharmacological Management
Herbal Products Used in Menopause and for Gynecological Disorders
Valerian Root in Treating Sleep Problems and Associated Disorders—A Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis
sources.authors: N. Shinjyo; G. Waddell; Julia Green
sources.note: valerian subjective sleep/anxiety, extract quality, severe adverse events

sources.title: Standardized Extract of Valeriana officinalis Improves Overall Sleep Quality in Human Subjects with Sleep Complaints: A Randomized, Double-Blind, Placebo-Controlled, Clinical Study
sources.authors: Harshith Chandra Shekhar; Lincy Joshua; Jestin Thomas
sources.note: valerian standardized extract, 8-week sleep complaint RCT, safety/tolerability

claimMap.claim: Valerian may improve subjective sleep quality and reduce anxiety in some studies, but results depend heavily on preparation quality.
claimMap.notes: Valerian may improve subjective sleep quality and reduce anxiety in some studies, but results depend heavily on preparation quality.

qualifiers.dose_or_duration: varied; whole root/rhizome may be more reliable; combination products common

claimMap.claim: A standardized valerian extract improved several subjective and objective sleep measures over 8 weeks in adults with sleep complaints.
claimMap.notes: A standardized valerian extract improved several subjective and objective sleep measures over 8 weeks in adults with sleep complaints.

dosage: Preparation-specific. One standardized extract RCT used an 8-week intervention in adults with sleep complaints; dose must be carried from the actual product/source rather than inferred. | Whole root/rhizome and standardized extracts differ; volatile/unstable constituents create quality-control issues.
typical_dosage: Preparation-specific. One standardized extract RCT used an 8-week intervention in adults with sleep complaints; dose must be carried from the actual product/source rather than inferred. | Whole root/rhizome and standardized extracts differ; volatile/unstable constituents create quality-control issues.
